snippet.title: SCHMEICHEL FEELS UNBEATABLE 🧤 ALMOST ALL GK STATS 99 💀 FULL NATIONAL GUARDIANS REVIEW 🔥
snippet.description:
In this video, I review the new National Guardians pack in eFootball 2026 / eFootball Mobile after testing all three players in real competitive Division matches.

00:00 Epic National Guardians Pack Opening
06:22 Ronald Koeman Player Build
07:41 Leonardo Bonucci Player Build

10:06 Peter Schmeichel vs Gianluigi Buffon Player Comparison
11:44 Epic National Guardians Team Selection
12:18 Epic National Guardians Gameplay Test
17:29 Ronald Koeman "Aerial Fort" Skill Gameplay Test
19:15 Peter Schmeichel "GK Directing Defence" Skill Gameplay Test
22:03 Ronald Koeman Player Review
23:07 Leonardo Bonucci Player Review
23:57 Peter Schmeichel Player Review
25:35 Epic National Guardians Pack Rating

Players reviewed:
* Peter Schmeichel - Defensive Goalkeeper 🧤
* Leonardo Bonucci - Build Up CB 🔥
* Ronald Koeman - The Destroyer 💀

And honestly…
Schmeichel feels absolutely insane. 👀

With almost every goalkeeper stat reaching 99, he genuinely has the potential to become one of the best goalkeepers in eFootball.

But surprisingly…
Koeman might actually be the most underrated player in this pack. ⚡

What this video covers:
* Full gameplay review 🎮
* Schmeichel goalkeeper testing 🧤
* Koeman defending and passing analysis ⚡
* Bonucci defensive gameplay 💀
* PvP Division gameplay
* Full National Guardians pack evaluation

Focus of the test: 🎯
* Schmeichel reflexes and saves
* Koeman’s underrated ingame performance
* Bonucci positioning and aerial ability
* Defensive consistency under pressure
* Determining if this pack is worth it

Key questions: ❓
* Is Schmeichel the best goalkeeper in eFootball?
* Are 99 goalkeeper stats actually noticeable?
* Is Koeman secretly the best player in the pack?
* Is the National Guardians pack worth opening?

snippet.title: Prof BOF Tries Out A 6 MAN BLITZ CURLER ATTACK But…It Ends In PAIN😭
snippet.description:
Blitz Curler is considered one of the most OP skills in eFootball 26 — so Prof BOF stacked SIX attackers with Blitz Curler in one team to see if it would break the game. Spoiler: it didn’t go as planned. Blitz Curler 107 Yamal, Blitz Curler Salah, blitz Curler Rumme, Blitz Curler Messi, Blitz Curler Del Piero, Blitz Curler Mbappe, Blitz Curler Zola, Blitz Curler Neymar, Blitz Curler Bale, Blitz Curler Son Heung Min.

In this video, I test a full attacking setup built entirely around Blitz Curler to find out whether skill stacking actually works or creates problems in real matches.

This experiment covers:
✅ 6-man Blitz Curler attacking setup
✅ Gameplay highlights & failures
✅ Why too many OP skills can hurt balance
✅ Tactical flaws exposed mid-match
✅ Final lesson: OP on paper ≠ OP in-game

If you’re thinking of building a Blitz Curler-heavy squad, watch this first. #efootball #efootball2026 #bofgames

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn.
